title: Latest ATER Stock News & Headlines
text: Aterian (ATER) Latest Stock News and Market Summary. 2024 Earnings Results Overview: In 2024, Aterian showed significant operational improvements. Full year 2024 net revenue was $99.0M (down from $142.6M in 2023). The company achieved enhanced gross margin of 62.1% (vs 49.3% in 2023). Operating loss decreased to $11.8M (vs $76.2M in 2023). Adjusted EBITDA showed improvement with positive cash flow of $2.2M in 2024 versus negative $13.4M in 2023. Q4 2024 Results: Fourth quarter 2024 net revenue declined to $24.6M from $32.8M year-over-year. Gross margin expanded substantially to 63.4% versus 51.0% previously. Operating loss narrowed to $1.6M from $8.2M. 2025 Guidance: Management projects net revenue will be between $104 million and $106 million, an increase of 5% to 7%. Company expects to reach break-even Adjusted EBITDA. Announced a $3M share repurchase program through March 2027. Market Performance: Stock gained 27.96% on Q4 2024 announcement date. Share price as of March 27, 2026 is $0.56 per share, compared to $2.10 per share on March 31, 2025, representing a decline of 73.31% over that period. Market capitalization: Just $4.85 million based on recent price levels.
